urdu transliteration text:
Parda e ghaybat me jab takHai imam e aakhriAS LONG AS THE FINAL IMAM IS IN OCCULTATION
KARBAL KI KAHAANI JAB KOI BHI SUNAYEGA
@HujjatELC
Karbal Ki Kahaani Jab Koi Bhi Sunayega- Whenever the Story of Karbala is Narrated
english translation text: WHENEVER THE STORY OF KARBALA IS NARRATED

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Karbal Ki Kahaani Jab Koi Bhi Sunayega- Whenever the Story of Karbala is Narrated
english translation text: Ishq e shahe deen ka yeh, silsila sadiyon se haiMatami sadiyon se hain aur, karbala sadiyon se haiKarbala se matami ka, raabta sadiyon se haiRok na paaegi mehshar, Tak isse dunya kabhiTHE LOVE FOR THE KING OF THE RELIGION HAS EXISTED THROUGH THE CENTURIESMATAMIS HAVE EXISTED FOR CENTURIES,KARBALA HAS EXISTED THROUGH CENTURIESTHE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN MATAMIS AND KARBALA, HAS EXISTED THROUGH CENTURIESTHIS WORLD WILL NOT BE ABLE TO STOP THIS TILL THE DAY OF RECKONING

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Karbal Ki Kahaani Jab Koi Bhi Sunayega- Whenever the Story of Karbala is Narrated
english translation text: Karbala Ki Khaak Me Shaamil Huwi Khaake ShifaMatami Ki Khaak Me Shaamil Hai Khaake KarbalaKhaak Hojaega Sab Kuch, Yeh Nahi Honge FanaBa Khuda Zamin Bane Hai, Inke Khud Aale NabiTHE DUST OF CURE WAS MIXED WITH THE DUST OF KARBALATHE DUST OF KARBALA WAS MIXED WITH THE CLAY OF THE MATAMISTHIS WORLD WILL BE REDUCED TO DUST, BUT THEY (MATAMIS & KARBALA) WILL NEVER BE DESTROYEDBY GOD, THEY ARE PROTECTED BY THE FAMILY OF THE PROPHET!

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Karbal Ki Kahaani Jab Koi Bhi Sunayega- Whenever the Story of Karbala is Narrated
english translation text: Saari dunya ki zameeno me hai afzal karbalaSaare insaano me afzal ba khuda ehle azaAb taqabul inse dunya me kisi ka kya bhalaKarbala to Karbala ha, Matami hai MatamiTHE LAND OF KARBALA IS THE THE HIGHEST AMONGST ALL LANDSBY GOD, THE PEOPLE OF HUSSAIN ARE HIGHER THAN THE RESTHOW CAN WE COMPARE THESE TO ANYTHING ELSE IN THE WORLD?KARBALA IS KARBALAMATAMIS ARE MATAMIS

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Karbal Ki Kahaani Jab Koi Bhi Sunayega- Whenever the Story of Karbala is Narrated
english translation text: Karbala me har ghari mowjood jaise matamiMatami ke dil me aise karbala hai har ghariWasf dono ke juda hai, Par hai dono ek hi Yeh azadari se sheh ki, Na juda honge kabhiJUST AS MATAMIS ARE ALWAYS IN KARBALAKARBALA IS ALWAYS IN THE HEART OF A MATAMITHEY HAVE DIFFERENT CHARACTERISTICS, BUT THEY ARE TRULY ONETHEY SHALL NEVER BE SEPARATED FROM THE AZADARI OF IMAM HUSSAIN

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Karbal Ki Kahaani Jab Koi Bhi Sunayega- Whenever the Story of Karbala is Narrated
english translation text: Khoon Me Asgher Hain DoobeNa Rahe Haye Shaahe AlamKarsaki Zainab Na MatamKyun Na Ho Matam BapaJab Talak Saanse Chalengi, Hoga Ye Matam YuhiASGHAR DROWNED IN BLOODTHE KING OF THE WORLD DIDN’T REMAINZAINAB WAS NOT ABLE TO LAMENTWHY SHOULD WE NOT LAMENTUNTIL OUR LAST BREATHWE WILL DO MATAM

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Karbal Ki Kahaani Jab Koi Bhi Sunayega- Whenever the Story of Karbala is Narrated
english translation text: Har ghari salman is per shukr ka sajda kiyaKarbalai bhi hain hum aur matami bhi ba khudaKyun Karim is per karein na fakhr hum ehle azaMatam e Sarwar mila aur, Karbala humko miliEVERY MOMENT, SALMAN, WE PROSTRATED IN THANKFULNESSBY GOD, WE ARE KARBALAI, AND WE ARE MATAMI WHY SHOULD WE NOT, KARIM, BE PROUD OF THISWE WERE BLESSED WITH THE MATAM OF IMAM HUSSAINWE WERE BLESSED WITH KARBALA
